title: Abu Hashim al-Jubba'i
body: Abū Hāshīm al-Jubbā'ī was a Mu'tazili theologian. He was born in 888 in Basra, and died in 933 in Baghdad. He was the son of Abū 'Alī Muḥammad al-Jubbā'ī, a prominent Mu'tazila scholar who was also the teacher of Abu al-Hassan al-Ash'ari.
categories: CS1 maint: work parameter with ISBN
